full_text:
Bian Bing 卞秉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bian Bing (卞秉)was born in Langye. Served Wei. Brother of Empress Bian. Bian Bing was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
